name: codex-workflow-skills
description: Guided workflow intake, adversarial review, and multi-perspective resume review skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guided intake, adversarial review, and resume review loops.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workflow Skills adds reusable skills for workflow routing, scoped intake, evidence-based adversarial review, and independent recruiter, hiring-manager, and teammate resume evaluation.
defaultPrompt: Use $workflow to route my request to intake or review.
Use $workflow-intake to scope this task before implementation.
Use $adversarial-review-loop to review this plan or diff.
Use $resume-multi-review to evaluate and revise my authoritative resume through three independent hiring lenses.
